extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won the sprint on uphill drag finish, breakaway of five held 2 minutes maximum before sprinter teams reeled them back
tactical_patterns: Six different teams committed to chase with only five riders ahead, revealing sprinter team depth concerns despite rare flat stage.
Break maintained advantage on winding technical descents where peloton couldn't corner faster collectively than smaller group ahead.
BENNETT positioned third wheel entering final uphill kilometer when others misjudged gradient, enabling him to hold slipstream then accelerate.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: positioned perfectly third wheel before uphill sprint finish, showing tactical maturity beyond pure speed
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: caught in late crash inside 3km but unhurt, teammates crashed ahead of him doing leadout duty
rider_signals.VAN DER SANDE Tosh: positive: attacked late on uphill drag surprising sprinters, finished third despite being caught
rider_signals.MEZGEC Luka: negative: crashed while Mitchelton-Scott led him out, team effort wasted on rare sprint opportunity
